projects.name: Simplex — Enterprise dbt Platform
projects.metrics: 248 dbt models · 41 Airflow DAGs · Custom Snowflake operators
projects.headline: Built and owned a production dbt platform from scratch
projects.starStory: Built Simplex's entire data transformation layer — 248 dbt models, 41 Airflow DAGs, and custom Snowflake MERGE operators. Owned the full pipeline from raw ingestion to BI-ready marts.

star.situation: Simplex had no centralized data transformation layer. Raw data landed from multiple sources with no standardized pipeline, making analytics unreliable and slow to deliver.
star.task: Build and own the entire data engineering stack end-to-end — from raw ingestion through transformation to BI-ready mart delivery — with no existing team or codebase to inherit.
star.action: Designed the full architecture from scratch: 248 dbt models organized into staging, intermediate, and mart layers; 41 Airflow DAGs for orchestration; custom Snowflake MERGE operators for idempotent incremental loads. Established coding standards and reviewed all new models.
star.result: Delivered a production-grade data platform that powered analytics across the company for 3 years. Zero critical data incidents in production ownership. Team went from ad-hoc SQL to a governed, testable, documented transformation layer.

projects.name: Nuvei — Custom dbt Materialization
projects.metrics: Custom dbt materialization for SingleStore · 45 SSIS packages · Trained full team
projects.headline: Built custom dbt materialization for SingleStore — never done before
projects.starStory: SingleStore wasn't supported by dbt. Wrote a custom materialization from scratch, trained the team on it, and migrated 45 SSIS packages to the new pattern.

star.situation: Nuvei was migrating from SQL Server/SSIS to SingleStore for faster analytics, but dbt — the team's chosen transformation tool — had no native SingleStore support. The entire migration was blocked.
star.task: Enable the data team to use dbt on SingleStore without vendor support, and lead the migration of 45 legacy SSIS packages to the new pattern.
star.action: Engineered a custom dbt materialization plugin for SingleStore from scratch. Handled edge cases including schema changes, incremental loads, and unique key constraints. Wrote documentation, held knowledge-transfer sessions, and personally reviewed the migration of 45 SSIS packages.
star.result: The team now runs dbt natively on SingleStore. 45 SSIS packages migrated. Migration timeline maintained. The custom materialization pattern became the standard approach for SingleStore + dbt and was shared externally with the community.

projects.name: POC — Snowflake vs Databricks Validation
projects.metrics: 12.6M records validated · 99.8% accuracy · Snowflake vs Databricks
projects.headline: Cross-platform data validation at 12.6M records with 99.8% accuracy
projects.starStory: Validated 12.6M records between Snowflake and Databricks for a platform migration decision. Achieved 99.8% row-level accuracy — the remaining 0.2% was explainable edge cases.

star.situation: The company was evaluating Snowflake vs Databricks for a major platform migration. The decision was stalled because leadership couldn't confirm data parity between the two systems, creating weeks of uncertainty.
star.task: Design and execute a rigorous validation framework to compare 12.6M records across both platforms and give leadership the confidence to commit to a migration direction.
star.action: Built a row-level validation framework that compared records across systems, flagged discrepancies, and categorized the root cause of each mismatch. Investigated the 0.2% discrepancy and proved each case was an explainable edge case (timezone normalization, float precision). Presented findings with statistical confidence to leadership.
star.result: 99.8% row-level accuracy confirmed. Leadership made the migration decision within one sprint. Saved several weeks of stalled decision-making. The validation framework became reusable for future platform comparisons.

projects.name: Verdict AI — Multi-AI Platform
projects.metrics: 76K LOC · 8 AI providers · SSE streaming · Solo build in 3 weeks
projects.headline: 76K line multi-AI platform solo in 3 weeks with 8 providers
projects.starStory: Built a production AI routing platform solo in 3 weeks — 76,000 lines of code, 8 AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.), SSE streaming, real-time routing. Shipped to production.

star.situation: Teams building AI features were forced to hardcode individual providers, leading to vendor lock-in, brittle integrations, and no ability to route traffic between models based on cost, latency, or capability.
star.task: Build a production-grade multi-provider AI routing platform solo under a 3-week deadline, supporting at least 8 providers with real-time streaming.
star.action: Architected and built the full system solo: provider abstraction layer, SSE streaming for real-time responses, admin routing rules UI, authentication, logging, and monitoring. 76,000 lines of code across frontend and backend. Made daily architecture decisions, shipped iteratively, and handled all debugging alone.
star.result: Shipped to production in exactly 3 weeks. Platform handles live traffic with 8 AI providers. Demonstrated extreme ownership, velocity, and the ability to make sound architectural decisions under pressure — all solo.

projects.name: Observability Dashboard
projects.metrics: 784K work items · 200ms load · $0 vs $150K/yr commercial tools
projects.headline: $0 alternative to $150K/yr observability tools — 784K items at 200ms
projects.starStory: Replaced $150K/yr commercial observability tools with a custom dashboard. Handles 784,000 work items with 200ms load time. Saved the company $150K/yr.

star.situation: The company was spending $150K/yr on commercial observability tools that were slow to load 784K work items and couldn't be customized to the team's specific alerting and aggregation needs.
star.task: Build a replacement observability dashboard that handles the full data volume at better performance, for zero cost.
star.action: Designed and built a custom dashboard from the ground up. Optimized query patterns for 784K-item loads, implemented real-time aggregation, built custom alerting rules, and created a configuration layer so teams could define their own views without code changes.
star.result: 784,000 work items now load in 200ms. Commercial tools fully replaced. $150K/yr in tool costs eliminated. Teams have more control over their monitoring than they ever had with the commercial solution.

projects.name: AI/ML Course Projects
projects.metrics: DistilBERT 98% precision · CNN Explorer 9K LOC · MIMIC-III healthcare ML
projects.headline: DistilBERT 98% precision, CNN Explorer, MIMIC-III healthcare ML
projects.starStory: Built DistilBERT fine-tuned model (98% precision), a 9K LOC CNN Explorer in TensorFlow.js, and healthcare ML on MIMIC-III dataset. Demonstrated ML fundamentals and applied AI.

star.situation: Wanted to move beyond theoretical ML knowledge and build real, measurable models across multiple domains — NLP, computer vision, and healthcare — to validate and upskill in applied AI.
star.task: Build production-quality ML projects that demonstrate end-to-end skills: data preparation, model training, evaluation, and deployment across three distinct domains.
star.action: Fine-tuned DistilBERT on a domain-specific NLP classification task; built a 9,000-line CNN Explorer in TensorFlow.js that lets users visually inspect convolutional filters and activations in the browser; trained models on the MIMIC-III clinical dataset for healthcare outcome prediction, handling de-identification and temporal features.
star.result: 98% precision on the NLP task. CNN Explorer used as a teaching tool. MIMIC-III work demonstrated domain-specific ML rigor. Proved ability to apply ML across NLP, CV, and healthcare with real measurable outcomes.
